papers.title: ZipCCL: Efficient Lossless Data Compression of Communication Collectives for Accelerating LLM Training
papers.abstract: Communication has emerged as a critical bottleneck in the distributed training of large language models (LLMs). While numerous approaches have been proposed to reduce communication overhead, the potential of lossless compression has remained largely underexplored since compression and decompression typically consume larger overheads than the benefits of reduced communication traffic. We observe that the communication data, including activations, gradients and parameters, during training often follows a near-Gaussian distribution, which is a key feature for data compression. Thus, we introduce ZipCCL, a lossless compressed communication library of collectives for LLM training. ZipCCL is equipped with our novel techniques: (1) theoretically grounded exponent coding that exploits the Gaussian distribution of LLM tensors to accelerate compression without expensive online statistics, (2) GPU-optimized compression and decompression kernels that carefully design memory access patterns and pipeline using communication-aware data layout, and (3) adaptive communication strategies that dynamically switch collective operations based on workload patterns and system characteristics. Evaluated on a 64-GPU cluster using both mixture-of-experts and dense transformer models, ZipCCL reduces communication time by up to 1.35$\times$ and achieves end-to-end training speedups of up to 1.18$\times$ without any impact on model quality.

digest.summaryZh: ZipCCL 面向大模型分布式训练中的通信瓶颈，提出面向 collective 通信的无损压缩库。它利用 LLM 训练张量近似高斯分布的特征做指数编码，并配合 GPU 优化压缩/解压 kernel 和自适应通信策略降低通信开销。
digest.motivationZh: LLM 训练中 activations、gradients 和 parameters 的通信已经成为关键瓶颈。传统无损压缩常因压缩/解压开销过大而不划算，论文希望利用训练张量分布特征让无损压缩真正转化为端到端加速。
digest.methodZh: 方法包括理论支撑的 exponent coding，避免昂贵在线统计；通信感知数据布局和流水化 GPU kernel；以及根据 workload 与系统特征动态切换 collective 操作的自适应通信策略。
digest.experimentsZh: 在 64-GPU 集群上评估 MoE 和 dense transformer 模型，ZipCCL 最多减少 1.35x 通信时间，并带来最高 1.18x 端到端训练加速，同时不影响模型质量。

papers.title: RCW-CIM: A Digital CIM-based LLM Accelerator with Read-Compute/Write
papers.abstract: Digital computing-in-memory (DCIM) has emerged as a promising solution for large language model (LLM) acceleration by minimizing data transfers between external DRAM and on-chip accelerators while maintaining high precision for superior accuracy. However, existing CIM architectures often overlook weight update latency, which becomes critical as LLM weights are far larger than a single CIM macro capacity. To address this issue, this paper proposes a read-compute/write (RCW) architecture that effectively minimizes weight update latency, along with a nonlinear operator fusion that further mitigates dependencyinduced latency. The proposed RCW reduces decoding computing latency by 21.59% on the Llama2-7B model. In addition, the nonlinear operator fusion mechanism achieves a 69.17% latency reduction through efficient partial accumulation and group-based approximation. Furthermore, a weight-stationary and output column stationary (WS-OCS) dataflow is introduced to reduce both external DRAM access and internal CIM weight updates by 51.6% and 87.6% respectively during the prefill phase of 1024 tokens, leading to an overall 49.76% latency reduction. Fabricated using TSMC 22 nm CMOS technology and operating at 100 MHz, the proposed RCW-CIM achieves 3.28 TOPS and 42.3 TOPS/W, enabling 4.2 ms prefill latency and 26.87 decoded tokens per second for the INT4-weight Llama2 model with dual DDR5-6400 memory.

papers.title: VitaLLM: A Versatile, Ultra-Compact Ternary LLM Accelerator with Dependency-Aware Scheduling
papers.abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices faces critical bottlenecks in memory bandwidth and power consumption. While ternary quantization (e.g., BitNet b1.58) significantly reduces model size, its direct deployment on general-purpose hardware is hindered by workload imbalance, bandwidth-bound decoding, and strict data dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VitaLLM}, a hardware-software co-designed accelerator tailored for efficient ternary LLM inference. We introduce a heterogeneous \textbf{Dual-Core Compute Strategy} that synergizes specialized TINT-Cores for massive ternary projections with a unified BoothFlex-Core for mixed-precision attention, ensuring high utilization across both compute-bound prefill and bandwidth-bound decode stages. Furthermore, we develop a \textbf{Leading One Prediction (LOP)} mechanism to prune redundant Key-Value (KV) cache fetches and a \textbf{Dependency-Aware Scheduling} framework to hide the latency of nonlinear operations. Implemented in TSMC 16nm technology, VitaLLM achieves a decoding throughput of 70.70 tokens/s within an ultra-compact area of 0.223 mm$^2$ and a power consumption of 65.97 mW. The design delivers a superior Figure of Merit (FOM) of 17.4 TOPS/mm$^2$/W, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art accelerators. Finally, we explore an extended bit-serial design (BoothFlex-BS) to demonstrate the architecture's adaptability for precision-agile inference.

papers.title: Exploring the Efficiency of 3D-Stacked AI Chip Architecture for LLM Inference with Voxel
papers.abstract: To overcome the well-known memory bottleneck of AI chips, 3D stacked architectures that employ advanced packaging technology with high-density through-silicon vias (TSVs) pins have proven to be a promising solution. The 3D-stacked AI chip enables ultra-high memory bandwidth between compute and memory by stacking numerous DRAM banks atop many AI cores in a distributed manner. However, it is not easy to explore the efficiency of the 3D-stacked AI chip, due to its unique distributed nature. And we need to carefully consider multiple intertwined factors that range from upper-level computing paradigm to machine learning (ML) compiler optimizations, and to the underlying hardware architecture. In this paper, we develop Voxel, a fast and compiler-aware end-to-end simulation framework to facilitate exploring the efficiency of 3D-stacked AI chips for large language model (LLM) inference. Voxel enables the software/hardware co-exploration by employing a programming interface that allows ML compilers to customize the model execution plans. After validating the results of Voxel with an emulator on real silicon, we thoroughly examine the impact and correlation of different aspects of 3D-stacked AI chips, including state-of-the-art compute paradigms, tile-to-core mapping, tensor-to-bank mapping, NoC topologies and link bandwidth, DRAM bank bandwidth, per-core SRAM capacity, and energy/thermal constraints. Our findings disclose that the end-to-end efficiency of a 3D stacked AI chip not only is determined by the cooperative function of these factors, but also significantly depends on the mappings from tiles to AI core and DRAM banks. We report our findings throughout the paper, with the expectation that they will shed light on the development of the 3D-stacked AI chip ecosystem. We will open source Voxel and our study results for public research.

papers.title: Efficient Training on Multiple Consumer GPUs with RoundPipe
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on consumer-grade GPUs is highly cost-effective, yet constrained by limited GPU memory and slow PCIe interconnects. Pipeline parallelism combined with CPU offloading mitigates these hardware bottlenecks by reducing communication overhead. However, existing PP schedules suffer from an inherent limitation termed the weight binding issue. Binding uneven model stages (e.g., the LM head is large) to GPUs limits the pipeline's throughput to that of the GPU with the heaviest load, leading to severe pipeline bubbles. In this paper, we propose RoundPipe, a novel pipeline schedule that breaks the weight binding constraint on consumer GPU servers. RoundPipe treats GPUs as a pool of stateless execution workers and dynamically dispatches computation stages across devices in a round-robin manner, achieving a near-zero-bubble pipeline. To ensure training correctness and system efficiency, RoundPipe integrates a priority-aware transfer scheduling engine, a fine-grained distributed event-based synchronization protocol, and an automated layer partitioning algorithm. Evaluations on an 8$\times$ RTX 4090 server demonstrate that RoundPipe achieves 1.48--2.16$\times$ speedups over state-of-the-art baselines when fine-tuning 1.7B to 32B models. Remarkably, RoundPipe enables LoRA fine-tuning of the Qwen3-235B model with 31K sequence length on a single server. RoundPipe is publicly available as an open-source Python library with comprehensive documentation.

papers.title: Unifying Sparse Attention with Hierarchical Memory for Scalable Long-Context LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Long-context LLM serving is bottlenecked by the cost of attending over ever-growing KV caches. Dynamic sparse attention promises relief by accessing only a small, query-dependent subset of the KV state per decoding step and extending the KV storage to CPU memory. In practice, however, these algorithmic savings rarely translate into end-to-end system-level gains because sparse methods typically operate at different granularities and thus rely on ad hoc, per-algorithm implementations. At the same time, hierarchical KV storage introduces a new systems bottleneck: retrieving fine-grained, irregular KV subsets across the GPU-CPU boundary can easily erase the benefits of sparsity. We present SPIN, a sparse-attention-aware inference framework that co-designs the execution pipeline with hierarchical KV storage through three techniques: (1) a unified partition abstraction that maps different sparsity granularities onto a shared page-based KV substrate; (2) a locality-aware KV cache manager that dynamically sizes per-request HBM budgets and uses a GPU-friendly bucketed LRU policy to cut PCIe round-trips; and (3) a two-level hierarchical metadata layout sized to the active working set rather than the worst-case address space. Built on vLLM with three representative sparse attention algorithms, SPIN delivers 1.66-5.66x higher end-to-end throughput and 7-9x lower TTFT than vLLM, and reduces TPOT by up to 58% over the original sparse-attention implementations.

digest.summaryZh: SPIN 面向长上下文 LLM serving，将动态稀疏注意力和分层 KV 存储统一到一个推理框架中。它通过 page-based KV 抽象、局部性感知 cache 管理和两级元数据布局，减少 GPU-CPU 之间不规则 KV 访问带来的系统开销。
digest.motivationZh: 长上下文 serving 的瓶颈在于不断增长的 KV cache。动态稀疏注意力理论上能减少访问量，但算法粒度不同和 GPU-CPU 分层存储的不规则访问，常会抵消端到端收益。
digest.methodZh: SPIN 在 vLLM 上实现统一 partition abstraction，将不同稀疏粒度映射到共享 page-based KV substrate；locality-aware KV cache manager 动态配置 HBM budget，并用 GPU-friendly bucketed LRU 减少 PCIe 往返；两级元数据布局按活跃工作集缩放。
digest.experimentsZh: 在 vLLM 和三种代表性稀疏注意力算法上，SPIN 端到端吞吐提升 1.66-5.66x，TTFT 降低 7-9x，并相比原始稀疏注意力实现最多降低 58% TPOT。

digest.summaryZh: HAIMA面向Transformer推理中矩阵乘法引发的数据搬移瓶颈，将SRAM与DRAM两类AIM协同用于不同MMMO，并配套并行数据流。作者称相对Newton、TransPIM实现1.4-1.5倍加速，重点解决DRAM-AIM在轻量矩阵乘法上的资源低利用。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是Transformer类大规模深度网络推理中MMMO使数据搬移开销超过计算开销。重要性在于嵌入式/边缘场景受延迟、带宽和资源利用约束，单纯DRAM内计算不一定高效。已有Newton、TransPIM等AIMA未区分Transformer层间并行度和资源需求差异，导致轻量MMMO在DRAM-AIMA上资源低利用、推理延迟升高。该问题直接对应用户关注的PIM、存储层次和Transformer加速器架构。
digest.methodZh: 这是硬件/体系结构与数据流协同设计。核心是HAIMA混合SRAM与DRAM accelerator-in-memory架构，把不同类型的Transformer矩阵-矩阵乘法映射到更合适的SRAM-AIM或DRAM-AIM，并用并行数据流组织执行。可读摘要未披露具体层级划分规则、阵列规模、数据布局和调度细节，因此方法新意可确认的是异构AIM协同而非单一DRAM PIM。
digest.experimentsZh: 可读来源只披露与Newton和TransPIM对比，指标为推理速度/延迟改善与资源利用；作者报告硬件-软件协同设计达到1.4-1.5倍加速，并缓解DRAM-AIMA执行轻量MMMO时的资源低利用。摘要/PDF可读部分未披露模型名称、序列长度、芯片制程、面积、能耗、频率和完整工作负载设置。
digest.affiliationsZh: CoLab条目显示作者单位为 Hunan University, College of Information Science and Engineering, China；DBLP/daily元数据未提供作者单位。

papers.matchedQuery: transformer accelerator architecture

digest.summaryZh: DRViT是面向Vision Transformer边缘推理的算法-架构协同FPGA加速器。它用动态token merging、token pruning和INT8量化削减冗余计算，并设计专用模块承接不规则模式；在Alveo U250上ViT-tiny达到0.86ms/image和1380GOP/s峰值。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是ViT在多模态/边缘场景中计算和存储需求高，尤其MHSA的Q/K/V在线生成、高维多头张量、LayerNorm/Softmax/GELU等非线性浮点操作以及低数据复用带来高延迟和能耗。已有轻量化算法会产生动态不规则token模式，若架构不能感知冗余和调度不规则性，就难以把算法收益变成硬件吞吐和能效。该问题与用户关注的Transformer/NPU加速、硬件友好量化和软硬件协同相关。
digest.methodZh: 这是算法-架构协同的FPGA系统。算法侧用动态token merging、token pruning和INT8量化减少ViT冗余计算与浮点非线性；架构侧设计动态冗余感知的专用数据流和模块，包括Token Merging and Pruning Module、Integer-Only Nonlinear Function Module、SLR Management Module等，将不规则token处理转化为可流式执行的硬件流程。新意在于同时处理token动态稀疏和整数化非线性，而不是只做静态量化或矩阵阵列。
digest.experimentsZh: 实现于Xilinx Alveo U250，使用Vivado 2020.1/2022.1，运行ViT-tiny/ImageNet并与CPU、GPU及其他FPGA加速器比较。报告140MHz下0.86ms/image、100MHz下1.17ms/image，峰值吞吐1380GOP/s，较以往SOTA提升2.24×。预览未完整披露所有baseline名称、准确率损失和能耗具体数值。
digest.affiliationsZh: 未在DBLP/arXiv元数据中提供；ScienceDirect预览显示作者有a/b上标但未展开机构名称，无法可靠写出全体作者单位。
digest.researchFitZh: 属于硬件体系结构主线，但模型是ViT而非LLM；对动态token稀疏、整数非线性和FPGA数据流设计有参考价值。
digest.whyReadZh: 值得继续读，重点看动态token合并/剪枝如何在硬件中避免控制和访存开销，以及Integer-Only Nonlinear模块的实现。
digest.limitationsZh: 本地无PDF；ScienceDirect预览只给摘要和节选，未完整披露baseline表、准确率变化、能耗细节和所有模块实现参数。

motivationDetail.problemZh: ViT在边缘/分布式多模态任务中计算、存储和非线性浮点开销高。
motivationDetail.gapZh: 轻量化token算法会引入不规则计算模式，通用CPU/GPU或普通FPGA映射难以高效利用。
motivationDetail.whyImportantZh: 边缘多模态应用要求低延迟、高能效和本地处理，云端部署不能满足实时与安全要求。
motivationDetail.userRelevanceZh: 关联AI加速器、Transformer数据流、硬件友好量化和软硬件协同。

methodDetail.coreIdeaZh: 用动态冗余感知轻量ViT算法配套专用FPGA架构，使token压缩和INT8量化直接降低延迟与能耗。
methodDetail.hardwareSystemDetailZh: 使用FPGA流式架构承载动态token处理；可读预览未披露片上缓冲大小、模块流水线深度和详细存储调度。

papers.title: Pimba: A Processing-in-Memory Acceleration for Post-Transformer Large Language Model Serving
papers.matchedQuery: processing in memory transformer
matchedQueries: processing in memory transformer
papers.relevanceReason: 命中 AI 处理器、体系结构、量化、训推系统或内存/缓存优化主题

digest.summaryZh: Pimba面向Mamba-2、线性注意力、RNN等post-transformer LLM与传统Transformer的统一服务瓶颈，提出GPU+PIM加速方案。其SPU跨两个bank共享，SPE采用MX8量化算术执行状态更新和注意力，报告相对GPU/GPU+PIM提升生成吞吐并降低能耗。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是长上下文LLM服务中Transformer注意力和post-transformer状态更新都会在batch推理下受内存带宽限制。重要性在于SSM、linear attention、RNN等新模型被用于降低长序列成本，但服务系统需要同时支持新旧模型。已有PIM多聚焦attention/GEMV；post-transformer状态更新包含逐元素乘加、点积等多种原语，逐bank PIM面积成本高，且低精度格式会影响持续状态更新准确性。该问题正中用户关注的LLM推理系统、PIM、KV/状态存储和硬件友好量化。
digest.methodZh: 这是PIM体系结构、低精度算术和GPU-PIM系统协同设计。Pimba将状态更新与attention offload到PIM，其他操作交给GPU；核心硬件是每两个bank共享一个State-update Processing Unit，内部SPE含MX8量化的向量乘法器和加法器，用交错访问读写不同bank的row buffer。系统还包含自定义DRAM命令与调度，支持状态预充和生成期计算。新意在于把post-transformer状态更新作为一等公民，而非只优化Transformer attention。
digest.experimentsZh: 评估覆盖Mamba-2、GLA、RetNet、HGRN2、Zamba2和OPT，比较GPU、GPU+Q、GPU+PIM、NeuPIMs/HBM-PIM等，指标包括生成吞吐、状态更新/attention延迟、能耗、准确率和面积。可读全文报告状态更新延迟较GPU/GPU+PIM低14.6×/6.9×，attention低6.3×/1.8×，能耗平均较GPU/GPU+PIM低2.2×/1.2×，面积开销13.4%。吞吐结果网页摘要与全文存在3.2×/4.1×相对GPU的不一致，但均报告相对GPU+PIM最高2.1×。
digest.affiliationsZh: 全文首页显示Wonung Kim、Yubin Lee、Yoonsung Kim、Jinwoo Hwang、Seongryong Oh、Jiyong Jung、Aziz Huseynov、Woong Gyu Park、Jongse Park为KAIST；Chang Hyun Park为Uppsala University；Divya Mahajan为Georgia Institute of Technology。
digest.researchFitZh: 非常贴合用户主线：它同时涉及LLM推理服务、PIM近存计算、post-transformer架构、低精度算术和GPU-PIM系统边界。
digest.whyReadZh: 应深读，尤其关注状态更新roofline、SPU跨bank共享的面积/吞吐权衡、MX8对连续状态更新准确率的影响，以及与attention PIM系统的兼容方式。
digest.limitationsZh: 可读来源中预印本/网页摘要对相对GPU吞吐上限有3.2×与4.1×差异，需核对最终ACM版本；部分模型规模、完整硬件参数和准确率表需读论文全文确认。

motivationDetail.problemZh: post-transformer LLM和Transformer在batched generation下都受内存带宽限制，尤其状态更新成为低算术强度瓶颈。
motivationDetail.gapZh: 既有LLM PIM系统主要针对attention/GEMV，不能高效支持状态更新；逐bank实现状态更新硬件面积过高。
motivationDetail.whyImportantZh: 长上下文、RAG、多模态输入推动序列长度增长，服务成本和GPU内存/带宽压力显著上升。
motivationDetail.userRelevanceZh: 直接对应LLM推理系统、PIM、状态/KV存储层次和硬件友好量化。
motivationDetail.evidence: ResearchGate full text; KAIST Pure metadata; GitHub README

methodDetail.coreIdeaZh: 用GPU+PIM统一服务Transformer和post-transformer，把attention与状态更新放到PIM中并用MX8降低数据搬移和面积。
methodDetail.hardwareSystemDetailZh: SPU交错访问两个bank的row buffer以维持吞吐并控制面积；PIM执行状态更新和attention，GPU处理其他层；使用MX8量化和随机舍入缓解连续状态更新精度损失。
methodDetail.noveltyZh: 从attention-centric PIM扩展到post-transformer状态更新，并在bank共享粒度上优化面积与吞吐。
methodDetail.evidence: ResearchGate full text method/intro; GitHub README

experimentDetail.setupZh: 模型包括RetNet、GLA、HGRN2、Mamba-2、Zamba2和OPT；主实验含2048/2048输入输出长度和batch 32/64/128，NeuPIMs比较使用Zamba2 70B、batch 128、1024/1024长度和8个A100张量并行设置。
experimentDetail.mainResultsZh: 状态更新延迟较GPU/GPU+PIM低14.6×/6.9×；attention延迟低6.3×/1.8×；能耗平均低2.2×/1.2×；面积开销13.4%；吞吐相对GPU+PIM最高2.1×，相对GPU上限在可读来源中为3.2×或4.1×。
experimentDetail.limitationsZh: 最终发表版本的吞吐上限需核对；摘要未完整给出每个模型的准确率与吞吐表。
experimentDetail.evidence: evaluation section in web full text

evidence.affiliationEvidence: ResearchGate全文首页列出作者单位。

papers.title: RoPIM: A Processing-in-Memory Architecture for Accelerating Rotary Positional Embedding in Transformer Models
papers.matchedQuery: processing in memory transformer
matchedQueries: processing in memory transformer
papers.relevanceReason: 命中 AI 处理器、体系结构、量化、训推系统或内存/缓存优化主题

digest.summaryZh: RoPIM针对Transformer中RoPE在推理阶段的高开销，提出bank-level PIM架构。它在内存侧支持乘加、并行数据重排，并用bank/row级数据映射减少bank间通信和DRAM激活；摘要报告RoPE占GPU时间61%，RoPIM最高307.9×性能提升和914.1×能耗节省。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是RoPE虽能在长序列中有效注入位置信息且无需重训，但推理时会因大量数据搬移和执行依赖成为瓶颈。作者观察RoPE占GPU执行时间61%。已有常规GPU/系统在处理RoPE这类位置编码算子时需要频繁搬移数据，长上下文下开销更突出。该问题与用户关注的LLM推理、长上下文内存层次、PIM和Transformer专用算子加速高度相关。
digest.methodZh: 这是面向RoPE算子的PIM硬件架构。RoPIM使用bank-level accelerator，在内存附近支持multiply-add操作以减少片外搬移；通过并行数据重排降低RoPE操作依赖；再用bank-level和row-level数据映射实现并行执行、消除bank-to-bank通信并减少DRAM activations。新意在于把通常被当作小算子的RoPE单独作为PIM加速对象，并围绕其旋转/重排模式设计数据映射。
digest.experimentsZh: 可读摘要只披露与conventional systems对比，指标为性能和能耗；结果为最高307.9×性能提升、914.1×能耗节省，并指出RoPE在GPU上占执行时间61%。摘要/PDF可读部分未披露具体Transformer模型、序列长度、GPU型号、PIM仿真配置、面积开销和平均结果。
digest.affiliationsZh: DGIST Pure条目列出Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science、Daegu Gyeongbuk Institute of Science and Technology以及Samsung；Yonsei页面还列出School of System & Semiconductor Engineering。具体作者到机构的映射未完全披露。
digest.researchFitZh: 非常贴合LLM推理内存层次与PIM方向，尤其适合关注长上下文位置编码、数据重排和近存算子加速的人继续读。
digest.whyReadZh: 应深读，因为它把RoPE这种通常不被单独建模的推理算子量化为主要GPU瓶颈，并给出bank/row级PIM映射策略。
digest.limitationsZh: IEEE CAL篇幅短且本地无PDF；可读摘要未披露完整实验设置、平均性能、面积和可扩展性边界。

motivationDetail.problemZh: RoPE在Transformer推理中因数据搬移和依赖导致高延迟。
motivationDetail.gapZh: 常规系统未把RoPE作为内存侧可并行化算子优化，导致长序列下位置编码开销显著。
motivationDetail.whyImportantZh: 长上下文LLM大量使用RoPE，若该算子占GPU执行时间61%，会直接限制端到端推理吞吐和能效。
motivationDetail.userRelevanceZh: 关联LLM推理、PIM、长上下文存储/数据流和专用算子硬件化。
motivationDetail.evidence: DGIST Scholar abstract; DGIST/Yonsei Pure metadata

methodDetail.coreIdeaZh: 把RoPE的乘加和数据重排下沉到bank-level PIM，并通过bank/row映射并行化执行。
methodDetail.hardwareSystemDetailZh: 方法减少off-chip data movement，消除bank-to-bank communication并减少DRAM activations；具体bank数量、ALU规模、命令时序和面积在摘要中未披露。
methodDetail.noveltyZh: 面向RoPE位置编码算子的专用PIM，而非仅加速GEMM/GEMV或attention。

experimentDetail.setupZh: 摘要/PDF可读部分未披露具体模型、数据集、序列长度、GPU或PIM仿真器。
experimentDetail.mainResultsZh: RoPE占GPU执行时间61%；RoPIM最高307.9×性能提升和914.1×能耗节省。
experimentDetail.limitationsZh: 未披露平均结果、面积开销、频率、制程和端到端LLM吞吐。

papers.title: SAL-PIM: A Subarray-Level Processing-in-Memory Architecture With LUT-Based Linear Interpolation for Transformer-Based Text Generation
papers.matchedQuery: processing in memory transformer
matchedQueries: processing in memory transformer
papers.relevanceReason: 命中 AI 处理器、体系结构、量化、训推系统或内存/缓存优化主题

digest.summaryZh: SAL-PIM是面向GPT类文本生成的HBM PIM架构，针对generation阶段逐token迭代、整模型反复读取且数据复用低的问题，把S-ALU放到subarray附近、用LUT线性插值处理非线性，并在HBM buffer die加入C-ALU完成跨bank归约。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是decoder-only GPT文本生成分为可并行summarization和难加速的sequential generation；generation每轮生成一个token且需要读取完整模型，数据复用少，使外部内存带宽成为系统瓶颈。已有GPU/常规加速器难以缓解反复权重读取和非线性函数开销。该问题对用户的LLM推理、HBM/PIM、内存带宽和端到端生成系统研究高度相关。
digest.methodZh: 这是HBM-based subarray-level PIM架构。SAL-PIM在memory subarray旁集成多个S-ALU以利用HBM内部带宽，并针对不同操作设计数据映射；为降低S-ALU面积，利用同bank命令慢时钟共享MAC；在bank内若干subarray作为LUT，通过多地址选择区间做线性插值以处理非线性函数；在HBM buffer die加入C-ALU执行跨bank accumulation和reduce-sum，目标是端到端在PIM中完成Transformer文本生成。
digest.experimentsZh: 作者基于Ramulator构建cycle-accurate simulator，并实现SAL-PIM逻辑单元于28nm CMOS后缩放到DRAM工艺验证可行性。工作负载为GPT-2 medium 345M，输入token 32-128、输出token 1-256；baseline为Nvidia Titan RTX GPU运行Faster Transformer。结果显示4.81%面积开销下，最高4.72×、平均1.83×加速。
digest.affiliationsZh: KAIST Pure条目显示作者单位为Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology, School of Electrical Engineering。
digest.researchFitZh: 非常贴合LLM推理系统、HBM/PIM、近存非线性函数和内存带宽优化，是用户主线内值得深读的架构论文。
digest.whyReadZh: 应深读，重点看S-ALU/C-ALU划分、LUT线性插值精度/面积权衡、GPT generation数据映射和端到端PIM边界。
digest.limitationsZh: 实验模型为GPT-2 medium，未从摘要确认更大LLM或KV cache现代长上下文设置；需看全文确认准确率影响、LUT误差和可扩展性。

motivationDetail.problemZh: GPT类generation阶段逐token迭代且每次读取全模型，外部内存带宽成为瓶颈。
motivationDetail.gapZh: 常规GPU和非端到端PIM难以同时处理线性层、非线性函数和跨bank归约。
motivationDetail.whyImportantZh: 文本生成是LLM服务核心路径，带宽瓶颈直接限制吞吐和能效。
motivationDetail.userRelevanceZh: 直接对应LLM推理、HBM/近存计算、非线性算子硬件化和内存层次设计。

methodDetail.coreIdeaZh: 在HBM subarray附近放置S-ALU并用LUT插值和C-ALU完成端到端Transformer文本生成。
methodDetail.hardwareSystemDetailZh: S-ALU利用内部带宽执行近存计算，LUT处理非线性，C-ALU负责跨bank累加/归约；面积控制来自同bank命令慢时钟下的MAC共享。
methodDetail.noveltyZh: 声称是首个用于Transformer文本生成端到端加速的HBM-based PIM架构，并把非线性函数也纳入PIM路径。

experimentDetail.setupZh: Ramulator cycle-accurate simulator；SAL-PIM逻辑单元28nm CMOS实现并缩放到DRAM；GPT-2 medium 345M；输入32-128 token，输出1-256 token。
experimentDetail.baselinesZh: Nvidia Titan RTX GPU running Faster Transformer Framework。
experimentDetail.mainResultsZh: 4.81%面积开销下，最高4.72×加速，平均1.83×加速。
experimentDetail.limitationsZh: 摘要未披露准确率/困惑度、能耗、频率和大模型扩展结果。

evidence.affiliationEvidence: KAIST Pure显示School of Electrical Engineering和KAIST。
evidence.experimentEvidence: KAIST Pure摘要披露Ramulator、28nm、GPT-2 medium、Titan RTX/Faster Transformer、4.81%和4.72×/1.83×。

low bit LLM inference accelerator

digest.summaryZh: 该文面向低比特LLM推理提出量化算法与bit-level加速器协同设计。算法将权重细分为cluster，显式考虑outlier和salient point并保护重要权重；硬件采用内存对齐编码和并行bit-level计算，摘要报告较ANT、OliVe、FineQ均有速度和能效提升。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是LLM推理同时受巨大计算量和模型内存占用限制，超低权重量化能减小带宽/容量压力，但会带来准确率下降和混合精度硬件执行复杂。已有量化方法对outlier、salient weights和组内分布处理不足，现有加速器也不一定能高效执行灵活低比特表示。该问题与用户关注的硬件友好量化、LLM推理加速、bit-level accelerator和软硬件协同高度相关。
digest.methodZh: 这是低比特量化算法与硬件加速器协同设计。算法侧先把权重划成小cluster，做fine-grained intra-cluster bit allocation，显式考虑每个cluster内outlier和salient point分布；再用intra-cluster protection选择性保留重要权重，并引入extended integer format和group-wise scale factor search降低激进降bit导致的精度损失。系统侧设计memory-aligned encoding支持高效访存和混合精度识别，硬件侧用轻量bit-level accelerator进行并行bit-level计算。
digest.experimentsZh: 摘要未披露具体LLM、任务、数据集、硬件平台和精度位宽分布；披露对比对象为SOTA量化算法以及ANT、OliVe、FineQ加速器。算法在超低权重精度下取得更高模型准确率；硬件相对ANT、OliVe、FineQ分别实现1.59×、1.38×、1.61×加速，以及1.52×、1.42×、1.22×能效提升。

digest.whyReadZh: 值得深读，重点看cluster内bit分配、重要权重保护、memory-aligned encoding如何映射到bit-level硬件，以及与ANT/OliVe/FineQ的公平性。

papers.title: HERMES++: Toward a Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: Driving world models serve as a pivotal technology for autonomous driving by simulating environmental dynamics. However, existing approaches predominantly focus on future scene generation, often overlooking comprehensive 3D scene understanding. Conversely, while Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities, they lack the capacity to predict future geometric evolution, creating a significant disparity between semantic interpretation and physical simulation. To bridge this gap, we propose HERMES++, a unified driving world model that integrates 3D scene understanding and future geometry prediction within a single framework. Our approach addresses the distinct requirements of these tasks through synergistic designs. First, a BEV representation consolidates multi-view spatial information into a structure compatible with LLMs. Second, we introduce LLM-enhanced world queries to facilitate knowledge transfer from the understanding branch. Third, a Current-to-Future Link is designed to bridge the temporal gap, conditioning geometric evolution on semantic context. Finally, to enforce structural integrity, we employ a Joint Geometric Optimization strategy that integrates explicit geometric constraints with implicit latent regularization to align internal representations with geometry-aware priors. Extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method. HERMES++ achieves strong performance, outperforming specialist approaches in both future point cloud prediction and 3D scene understanding tasks. The model and code will be publicly released at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/HERMESV2.

papers.title: LaST-R1: Reinforcing Action via Adaptive Physical Latent Reasoning for VLA Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have increasingly incorporated reasoning mechanisms for complex robotic manipulation. However, existing approaches share a critical limitation: whether employing explicit linguistic reasoning that suffers from latency and discretization, or utilizing more expressive continuous latent reasoning, they are predominantly confined to static imitation learning that limits adaptability and generalization. While online reinforcement learning (RL) has been introduced to VLAs to enable trial-and-error exploration, current methods exclusively optimize the vanilla action space, bypassing the underlying physical reasoning process. In this paper, we present \textbf{LaST-R1}, a unified VLA framework that integrates latent Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning over physical dynamics prior to action execution, along with a tailored RL post-training paradigm. Specifically, we propose \textbf{Latent-to-Action Policy Optimization (LAPO)}, a novel RL algorithm that jointly optimizes the latent reasoning process and the action generation. By bridging reasoning and control, LAPO improves the representation of physical world modeling and enhances robustness in interactive environments. Furthermore, an \textbf{adaptive latent CoT mechanism} is introduced to allow the policy to dynamically adjust its reasoning horizon based on environment complexity. Extensive experiments show that LaST-R1 achieves a near-perfect 99.8\% average success rate on the LIBERO benchmark with only one-shot supervised warm-up, significantly improving convergence speed and performance over prior state-of-the-art methods. In real-world deployments, LAPO post-training yields up to a 44\% improvement over the initial warm-up policy across four complex tasks, including both single-arm and dual-arm settings. Finally, LaST-R1 demonstrates strong generalization across simulated and real-world environments.

papers.title: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent visual generation models have made major progress in photorealism, typography, instruction following, and interactive editing, yet they still struggle with spatial reasoning, persistent state, long-horizon consistency, and causal understanding. We argue that the field should move beyond appearance synthesis toward intelligent visual generation: plausible visuals grounded in structure, dynamics, domain knowledge, and causal relations. To frame this shift, we introduce a five-level taxonomy: Atomic Generation, Conditional Generation, In-Context Generation, Agentic Generation, and World-Modeling Generation, progressing from passive renderers to interactive, agentic, world-aware generators. We analyze key technical drivers, including flow matching, unified understanding-and-generation models, improved visual representations, post-training, reward modeling, data curation, synthetic data distillation, and sampling acceleration. We further show that current evaluations often overestimate progress by emphasizing perceptual quality while missing structural, temporal, and causal failures. By combining benchmark review, in-the-wild stress tests, and expert-constrained case studies, this roadmap offers a capability-centered lens for understanding, evaluating, and advancing the next generation of intelligent visual generation systems.

papers.title: Exploration Hacking: Can LLMs Learn to Resist RL Training?
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become essential to the post-training of large language models (LLMs) for reasoning, agentic capabilities and alignment. Successful RL relies on sufficient exploration of diverse actions by the model during training, which creates a potential failure mode: a model could strategically alter its exploration during training to influence the subsequent training outcome. In this paper we study this behavior, called exploration hacking. First, we create model organisms of selective RL resistance by fine-tuning LLMs to follow specific underperformance strategies; these models can successfully resist our RL-based capability elicitation in agentic biosecurity and AI R&D environments while maintaining performance on related tasks. We then use our model organisms to evaluate detection and mitigation strategies, including monitoring, weight noising, and SFT-based elicitation. Finally, we show that current frontier models can exhibit explicit reasoning about suppressing their exploration when provided with sufficient information about their training context, with higher rates when this information is acquired indirectly through the environment. Together, our results suggest exploration hacking is a possible failure mode of RL on sufficiently capable LLMs.

digest.summaryZh: AgentDrive提出面向自动驾驶agentic AI推理的开放基准，包含30万条LLM生成驾驶场景和10万道多选题。它用七个场景轴组织prompt-to-JSON生成、仿真rollout、安全指标和规则标签，并评测50个LLM的物理、法规、场景等推理能力。
digest.motivationZh: 问题是LLM正被用于自动系统的感知、规划和决策，但缺少大规模、结构化、安全关键的benchmark来训练和评估agentic AI。重要性在于自动驾驶决策需要物理一致、法规合规和安全推理，而现有基准难覆盖多样场景和长尾安全情况。与用户硬件主线关系较弱，但可作为agent/多模态后训练趋势背景，并提示未来边缘/车载LLM推理可能需要面向安全场景的评测负载。
digest.methodZh: 这是数据集/benchmark与评测管线，不是硬件或系统架构。AgentDrive将驾驶场景形式化为七个正交轴：scenario type、driver behavior、environment、road layout、objective、difficulty、traffic density；用LLM驱动的prompt-to-JSON流程生成simulation-ready规格，并做物理/模式约束校验、仿真rollout、surrogate safety metric计算和规则标签。另构建AgentDrive-MCQ，覆盖physics、policy、hybrid、scenario、comparative五类推理。
digest.experimentsZh: 实验设置为AgentDrive-MCQ 10万道多选题，评估50个LLM；全文首页列出GPT-5、ChatGPT 4o、Gemini 2.5 Flash、DeepSeek V3、Qwen3 235B、ERNIE 4.5 300B、Grok 4、Mistral Medium 3.1、Phi 4 Reasoning Plus等。指标是五类推理维度上的表现；摘要只给定性结论：闭源frontier模型在contextual/policy reasoning领先，先进开源模型在structured和physics-grounded reasoning上快速缩小差距，未披露具体分数表。
digest.affiliationsZh: ResearchGate全文首页显示Mohamed Amine Ferrag和Abderrahmane Lakas所属Department of Computer and Network Engineering, College of Information Technology, United Arab Emirates University, Al Ain, UAE；Merouane Debbah所属Khalifa University of Science and Technology, Abu Dhabi, UAE。
digest.researchFitZh: 属于二级算法/agent趋势观察，与硬件加速器关系间接；可用于理解未来车载agent推理工作负载和评测维度。

digest.limitationsZh: LLM生成场景的真实世界覆盖和仿真有效性需进一步验证；摘要未披露硬件推理成本、延迟、能耗或部署系统；具体模型分数需读全文表格。

papers.title: An adaptive wavelet-based PINN for problems with localized high-magnitude source
papers.abstract: In recent years, physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have gained significant attention for solving differential equations, although they suffer from two fundamental limitations, namely, spectral bias inherent in neural networks and loss imbalance arising from multiscale phenomena. This paper proposes an adaptive wavelet-based PINN (AW-PINN) to address the extreme loss imbalance characteristic of problems with localized high-magnitude source terms. Such problems frequently arise in various physical applications, such as thermal processing, electro-magnetics, impact mechanics, and fluid dynamics involving localized forcing. The proposed framework dynamically adjusts the wavelet basis function based on residual and supervised loss. This adaptive nature makes AW-PINN handle problems with high-scale features effectively without being memory-intensive. Additionally, AW-PINN does not rely on automatic differentiation to obtain derivatives involved in the loss function, which accelerates the training process. The method operates in two stages, an initial short pre-training phase with fixed bases to select physically relevant wavelet families, followed by an adaptive refinement that adapts scales and translations without populating high-resolution bases across entire domains. Theoretically, we show that under certain assumptions, AW-PINN admits a Gaussian process limit and derive its associated NTK structure. We evaluate AW-PINN on several challenging PDEs featuring localized high-magnitude source terms with extreme loss imbalances having ratios up to $10^{10}:1$. Across these PDEs, including transient heat conduction, highly localized Poisson problems, oscillatory flow equations, and Maxwell equations with a point charge source, AW-PINN consistently outperforms existing methods in its class.

digest.summaryZh: AW-PINN 面向含局部高幅值源项的偏微分方程，提出自适应小波基物理信息神经网络，以缓解谱偏置和多尺度损失不平衡。该主题偏科学机器学习，与大模型体系结构主线相关性较弱。
digest.motivationZh: PINN 在求解微分方程时常受神经网络谱偏置和多尺度损失不平衡限制，局部高幅值源项会造成极端损失比例。论文希望用自适应小波基提高对高尺度局部特征的建模能力。
digest.methodZh: 方法根据残差和监督损失动态调整小波基函数，先短暂预训练选择物理相关小波族，再自适应细化尺度和平移，避免在全域铺满高分辨率基。它还避免用自动微分计算损失中的导数以加速训练。
digest.experimentsZh: 论文在瞬态热传导、局部 Poisson、振荡流和带点电荷 Maxwell 方程等 PDE 上评估，损失不平衡最高达 10^10:1。结果显示 AW-PINN 持续优于同类方法，但摘要未给出具体加速或误差数值。
digest.affiliationsZh: 未在 DBLP/arXiv 元数据中提供。
